title: Full-Stack Web Development
description: Building modern websites and web applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL from front to back.

title: Server Administration
description: Setting up, securing, and managing Linux servers, Nginx and Apache web servers, and cloud infrastructure for production workloads.

title: Network Engineering
description: Designing and configuring enterprise networks including firewalls, VPN setup, DNS management, and LAN/WAN connectivity.

title: IT Infrastructure
description: Planning and maintaining scalable IT systems with automated backups, uptime monitoring, CI/CD pipelines, and SSL certificate management.
